title: hydnocarpus kingii
intro: Hydnocarpus kingii, also known as the King's Stillingia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alismataceae. It is a medicinal plant native to the Himalayas, used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains medicinal properties such as hydnocarpus extract, which is known for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, thereby providing relief from headaches, colds, and other infections.
